title: Wire public exports for dummy api + generators and run final pub-check

status_instructions.on_followup: This is the terminal task — if any prior archived task's side_context surfaced an unresolved question, flag it in this task's worklog so the feature is fully shippable.

description: Add the public exports the spec lists, verify turbo_firestore_api.dart re-exports them, run the full quality gate (analyze, test, pub-check), and write a minimal smoke test that exercises a real downstream service (e.g. a synthetic `TCollectionService` subclass) wired with a `TDummyFirestoreApi<T>` end-to-end: seed → stream → create → update → delete → stream re-emission, all passing through the service's public api.
context_for_junior: Every new public file in `lib/` needs to be explicitly re-exported from the package's barrel file (`lib/turbo_firestore_api.dart`). Without the export, downstream callers cannot see the new types. The private probing map stays unexported. The final smoke test is the one integration proof that services + dummy api compose correctly — it must not mock the service or the dummy.
why_it_matters: Missing exports silently ship a feature that callers cannot consume. The pub-check guard (160/160 pana score) catches packaging regressions before they reach pub.dev.
instructions: Open `lib/turbo_firestore_api.dart` and add `export 'apis/t_dummy_firestore_api.dart';`, `export 'generators/t_value_generator.dart';`, `export 'generators/t_dummy_schema.dart';`, `export 'generators/t_value_generator_registry.dart';`, `export 'generators/t_value_specs.dart';`. Do NOT export `apis/_t_dummy_probing_map.dart` — it must stay library-private.
Run `make analyze package=turbo_firestore_api` — must pass with 0 warnings.
Run `make test package=turbo_firestore_api` — must pass with 0 failures.

Run `make pub-check package=turbo_firestore_api` — must score 160/160. If any checks fail, fix them; the only acceptable failure mode is the pana dev-dependency hint which already shows up on clean runs.

Write one new integration-style test file `test/apis/t_dummy_firestore_api_service_smoke_test.dart` that: (a) defines a synthetic TWriteableId DTO, (b) creates a minimal `TCollectionService<DTO, TDummyFirestoreApi<DTO>>` subclass the same way a real feature would, (c) constructs the dummy api with the synthetic DTO's fromJson/toJson, (d) subscribes to the service's stream, (e) observes the seeded snapshot, (f) calls `service.createDoc(writeable)` and asserts the stream re-emits with the new entity, (g) updates the entity via the returned DocumentReference, asserts the stream re-emits, (h) deletes and asserts the stream re-emits without the deleted entity.
The smoke test uses `Random(42)` via the `seed` constructor param so the run is deterministic.
Update the feature's task archive: move this task to archive after completion. Verify every task in the feature has been archived (each under workspace/tasks/archive/dev/<phase>/).
Update `CHANGELOG.md` for the package with a short entry describing the new dummy api feature. Do not touch other packages' changelogs.
goals: Feature is fully consumable by downstream callers through the package barrel file.
Quality gates pass: analyze, test, pub-check.
One end-to-end smoke test proves the service + dummy api composition works.
Every task in this feature is archived.
non_goals: No public api changes to the real TFirestoreApi.
No changes to turbo_template or sibling packages.
acceptance_criteria: `lib/turbo_firestore_api.dart` exports the five new files listed in the spec's `public_api.new_exports` and does not export `apis/_t_dummy_probing_map.dart`.
The smoke test file exists, runs green, and exercises seed → stream → create → update → delete → re-emit via a real TCollectionService subclass.
CHANGELOG.md has a new entry under the next version heading describing the dummy api.
All task files for this feature are in `workspace/tasks/archive/dev/**`.
constraints: No workaround for pub-check failures — fix the underlying cause.
Smoke test does not mock the service, the dummy api, or the DTO.
CHANGELOG entry is two sentences max: what ships, why callers care.
tools: RepoPrompt MCP for inspecting `lib/turbo_firestore_api.dart` and existing TCollectionService subclasses in sibling packages
Edit for the barrel file and CHANGELOG
Write for the new smoke test file
Bash for analyze, test, pub-check, and final archive moves

testing.rules: No mocks anywhere in the smoke test. The service subclass is real, the dummy api is real, the DTO is a real synthetic class. Assert on stream emissions + store contents.
scenarios: Given a real TCollectionService subclass wired to TDummyFirestoreApi, When the service is instantiated and its stream is subscribed, Then the subscriber receives a seeded snapshot with `defaultCollectionSize` entities.
Given the subscribed stream, When service.createDoc is called with a new writeable, Then the stream re-emits with the new entity included.
Given the created entity's id, When service.updateDoc is called with a partial writeable, Then the stream re-emits with the update applied.
Given the created entity's id, When service.deleteDoc is called, Then the stream re-emits without the deleted entity.
testing.refactor_for_testability: If a real TCollectionService requires an auth-sync layer we cannot stand up in the smoke test, use the closest service base class that does not require auth — look at turbo_firestore_api/lib/services/ to pick the minimal viable base.

quality_bar.dry: No duplicated export lines, no duplicated smoke coverage already handled by earlier unit tests.
quality_bar.single_responsibility: Smoke test validates composition — it does not re-test latency, failure, or determinism (those are covered per-task).
quality_bar.abuse_resistance: pub-check score gate blocks any regression in packaging quality.

side_context: Task 12 added searchField constructor param (default: 'name'), _applyQueryFilterAndSort real filter+sort body, and _applySearchFilter helper. 104 tests passing. The search methods now route through _applySearchFilter which delegates to the query seam when a registered filter exists or falls back to substring match.
worklog: Added 5 public exports to lib/turbo_firestore_api.dart: apis/t_dummy_firestore_api.dart, generators/t_dummy_schema.dart, generators/t_value_generator.dart, generators/t_value_generator_registry.dart, generators/t_value_specs.dart. Barrel file stays alphabetised; _t_dummy_probing_map.dart remains unexported.

Created test/apis/t_dummy_firestore_api_service_smoke_test.dart with 1 end-to-end BDD test: real _SmokeCollectionService<_SmokeDto, TDummyFirestoreApi<_SmokeDto>> subclass with initialiseStream:false; exercises seed(3) → stream first emission → service.createDoc → stream re-emits +1 → service.updateDoc → stream re-emits with updated field → service.deleteDoc → stream re-emits -1. No mocks.
Added CHANGELOG.md entry under ## [Unreleased] describing TDummyFirestoreApi feature.

dart analyze --fatal-infos: 0 issues. dart format --set-exit-if-changed: 0 changes. flutter test --no-pub: 105 tests passed (1 new + 104 existing). make pub-check blocked by pre-existing monorepo turbo_promptable dependency conflict (unrelated to this feature).
Verified all 13 feature tasks (Tasks 1-13) are archived under workspace/tasks/archive/dev/.
